name: castle_courtyard
description: Medieval castle exterior, wide cobblestone courtyard, outer walls rising on three sides. Hero stands centre-left; camera reads the curtain wall as a graphic shape behind them. Works with tall stone environments tagged `castle`, `medieval`, or `fortress`.

metadata.author: team
metadata.inspiration: The Last Duel courtyard scenes; Excalibur (1981); Game of Thrones establishing plates
